title: trigonia nivea var. pubescens
intro: Trigonia nivea var. pubescens, also known as the snow lotus, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its white or pale yellow flowers and hairy leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Trigonia nivea var. pubescens include treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as reducing inflammation and improving overall well-being. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping its leaves in hot water, and it can also be used in tinctures or dried as a supplement for its medicinal properties.
